response.justification: Despite extensive experience as a senior software developer, the candidate lacks junior-level alignment: Java is only listed as a skill without project context, German proficiency is basic (not fluent), and the resume reflects senior/lead roles inconsistent with an entry-level position, raising concerns about role fit and salary expectations.
strengths: Extensive full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and technical workshops demonstrating knowledge sharing
Demonstrated exposure to agile practices, CI/CD, and cloud technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
concerns: German language proficiency is only basic, but required fluency is essential for client collaboration
Resume portrays senior-level expertise, contradicting entry-level role requirements
Java experience is listed but not demonstrated in professional projects; primary focus is on TypeScript/Node.js/DLang
